title: Static Corrosion Protection Zip Bag Rifle and Pistol Sizes Good for 20 Years
description:
Static Intercept Technology Sleeve by ASR Tactical is the ultimate for long term storage of small sporting goods, electronics and anything metallic items. This cutting edge sleeve is made of a unique material that permanently dissipates all static and protects ferrous and non-ferrous metals from corrosion. Items will remain rust free in this bag for up to 20 years. A perfect storage solution for all things you want to protect

Static Corrosion Protection Zip Bag Rifle and Pistol Sizes Good for 20 Years

Static Intercept Technology Sleeve by ASR Tactical is the ultimate for long term storage of small sporting goods, electronics and anything metallic items.

Key Features

  • Dissipates static permanently and protections from corrosion
  • Size: 6 x 8.5 inches
  • Store items in this bag for up to 20 years without having to worry about rust or corrosion
  • Colors: Black or Copper

Product Specifications

  • MPN: SLB-3-829
  • UPC: 707589779814
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 6 in x 8 1/2 in

This cutting edge sleeve is made of a unique material that permanently dissipates all static and protects ferrous and non-ferrous metals from corrosion. Items will remain rust free in this bag for up to 20 years.

A perfect storage solution for all things you want to protect
